additionalData.description: a map of name/value pairs for passing in additional/industry-specific data

billingAddress.description: The address where to send the invoice.

card.description:
Credit card data.

Optional if `shopperReference` and `selectedRecurringDetailReference` are provided.

selectedRecurringDetailReference.description: The `recurringDetailReference` you want to use for this payment. The value `LATEST` can be used to select the most recently stored recurring detail.

shopperEmail.description: the email address of the person

shopperReference.description:
Required for recurring payments. 
Your reference to uniquely identify this shopper, for example user ID or account ID. Minimum length: 3 characters.
> Your reference must not include personally identifiable information (PII), for example name or email address.

subMerchant.description:
Required for Back-to-Back/ purchase driven load in Wallet transactions.
Contains the final merchant who will be receiving the money, also known as subMerchant, information.

telephoneNumber.description: the telephone number of the person
